text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to my office when I overhear some
mumbling.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Big carrots plus ice cream... equals present
progressive tense...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm juuust about finished with my... extra
homework...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I have a hard time remembering grammar rules, so
I'm using food as examples!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If I conjugate big carrots, then ice cream should
be...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uh... I'll just write down, "I like carrot ice cream."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's strange technique doesn't help her
remember any grammar rules, so she has to take
even more extra classes... leading to exhaustion.
